# NSURLErrorFailingURLPeerTrustErrorKey

The corresponding value is the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecTrust] object representing the state of a failed SSL handshake. This key is only present in the [doc://com.apple.foundation/documentation/Foundation/NSURLErrorDomain].
title: NSURLErrorFailingURLPeerTrustErrorKey
